retry_reason: On failure, the original buffer is already freed, so retrying with the same pointer is invalid. The caller must handle the error without retrying the same call.

judge.reason: The function performs a tree-mod-log rewind operation, which includes buffer allocation/cloning, unlocking, freeing the original buffer, acquiring a read lock on the new buffer, and applying modifications. The reference-count operations (freeing the old buffer and using the new one) are part of a larger lifecycle management pattern, not the primary purpose.
